title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
